working_on: Building energy and getting back to a healthy baseline. Eating with intention, moving with more purpose, and getting my testosterone back to where I feel like myself again.
thinking_about: How to make the most of this summer. My wife needs support and my kids need structure. Getting both of those right at the same time is its own kind of project.
playing: Terraria. First playthrough is finished; the Moon Lord is down. Now I'm collecting the rare items I'm still missing, with the daytime Empress of Light left to beat, and weighing a fresh start with the Calamity mod.
